resultList.dtldesc: Introducing the exquisite residential offering of 2 BHK and 3 BHK flats for sale in Mana Verdant, located in the coveted Nehru Nagar on Jakkur Road, Bangalore. This residential complex boasts a lower density with only 381 units, ensuring a serene and spacious living environment for its residents.Property SpecificationsThe property features thoughtfully designed 2 BHK flats with a super area of 1240 square feet and 3 BHK flats starting from 1547 square feet, extending up to 2022 square feet. With 70 open space and 35 UDS, the flats offer a substantial carpet area, allowing for comfortable and functional living spaces.The towers stand tall with a total of 18 floors, providing panoramic views of the surroundings. The property also offers the convenience of 2 basement parking levels and 1 stilt parking facility, ensuring ample parking space for residents and their guests.The unfurnished flats are designed to cater to the principles of Vaastu compliance, offering a harmonious living experience. The flats offer the advantage of being east and north facing, allowing for ample natural light and ventilation throughout the day.The spacious layout comprises 3 bedrooms, providing ample space for a growing family. There are 2 attached bathrooms and 1 common bathroom, all equipped with Western-style fittings and geysers for hot water supply. The flat features 3 balconies, with one attached to the master bedroom, another to a bedroom, and the third one linked to the hall, overlooking the garden and main road.The L-shaped living cum dining area offers flexibility in arranging your furniture and creating a comfortable space for relaxation. The kitchen is functional and comes with a utility area and piped gas connection, for added convenience. The flooring throughout the flats is made of high-quality vitrified tiles.FacilitiesResidents will benefit from various facilities and amenities provided within the complex. Covered parking, 24 hours water supply both borewell  corporation, 100 power backup, security guards, CCTV cameras and 4 lifts are available. In addition, a 17,000 sqft, 5-storey clubhouse with an infinity swimming pool is also provided.LocalityThe locality of Mana Verdant is strategically located, with easy access to the main international airport highway just 1 kilometer away. Reputed educational institutions such as HDFC School, Vibgyor School, and Cambridge School are within a 5-minute drive.Major multispecialty hospitals are also conveniently located within a 5-minute radius. The Galleria Mall and Phoenix Mall of Asia are within a 5-minute drive. The property is just 1 km from Yelahanka Junction and a 15-minute drive from Manyata Tech Park.Excellent public transportation options are easily accessible, with a nearby railway station within a 5-minute drive. Additionally, two metro stations, namely Kodigahalli Metro Station and Yelahanka Metro Station, are in close proximity.

resultList.dtldesc: Welcome to your dream home in the prestigious Eden Park at The Prestige City, Sarjapur, Bangalore This stunning 2 BHK flat for sale offers a spacious super area of 971 sqft and is located on the 9th floor of an impressive 28-floor building.Property specifications and facilitiesDesigned to be vaastu compliant, this residence features a desirable west-facing orientation that allows for beautiful sunsets and ample natural light. The flat comes unfurnished, providing you with a blank canvas to design your ideal living space. The flat includes two well-sized bedrooms, with two bathroomsone attached to the master bedroom and one common bathroom, both fitted with modern western fixtures and geyser points for your convenience. The normal kitchen is equipped with a piped gas connection and an attached utility area, making meal preparation a breeze.The living cum dining area is perfect for family gatherings and entertaining guests, while the balcony attached to the hall offers serene views overlooking lush greenery, creating a peaceful atmosphere. The flooring throughout the flat is elegantly finished with vitrified tiles, enhancing the contemporary feel.Residents will enjoy the benefits of covered parking, ensuring your vehicle is protected, and a 24-hour water supply along with 100 power backup for uninterrupted living. For added security, a dedicated security guard is present on-site, complemented by CCTVs installed throughout the premises. The building is equipped with three lifts plus one service lift for easy access to all floors.LocalityConveniently located near the landmark of The Prestige City, this flat is within 1 km of schools, hospitals, and mallssupermarkets, including the popular D-Mart, making daily errands effortless. Public transport options, including buses and autos, are readily available, and banks and ATMs are nearby for your convenience. The railway station and metro station are both just 2 km away, ensuring excellent connectivity to the rest of Bangalore.
